rag_no_rag_summary: The No-RAG answer sounded confident, but it was only a guess unless backed by the document. The RAG version is the one you should trust because it cites the actual policy text
rag_grounded_summary: The grounded answer should say that primary caregivers get 26 weeks of fully paid parental leave, while secondary caregivers get 2 weeks of fully paid leave. It should also note that the leave must be used within 12 months of the child’s birth or adoption date.
stretch_notes:
The provided document wins. In a RAG setup, the grounded text overrides the model’s prior memory, so if they conflict, you answer from the document only.

Example: if the model “knew” meals were included, but the document says meals are reimbursed separately only when pre-approved, the document is the correct source for that run.
